reason: Response B has the self-referential, recursive humor that tends to characterize Claude's wit - the joke loops back on itself ("morning person before becoming a morning person"), which is a compact logical twist rather than a poetic observation. Response A reads more like literary prose dressed up as a one-liner, with the "darkness/clarity" metaphor feeling more like a stylistic affectation than genuine wit.
